'''Nofft Masst''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]]. He was the son of [[Ordrin Masst]]. He ran the repair facility in [[Storrd Township]] on [[Seregar]] with his brother [[Burdek Masst|Burdek]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Seregar Turnabout|book=No Disintegrations (West End Games)}} {{1st}}
